description: Recall relevance golden set v2 — 12 queries designed to exercise semantic, keyword, and hybrid search across the corpus_v2.json seed corpus. Each query has fragments that must appear in relevant results.

samples.query: database security row level security RLS tenant isolation
relevant_content_fragments: RLS is enforced at the database level
We must never bypass Row Level Security
Multi-tenant isolation: every table has tenant_id

user preferences dark mode concise responses notifications
conflict detection dedup supersession content hash
multi-tenant workspace membership roles agent groups
recall scoring formula importance trust confidence budget
knowledge graph tunnels topology relationships cross-domain
SSH hardening multi-user security password authentication
